props.name: curve
props.description: Default interpolation for every series (per-series `curve` wins).

props.name: detectGaps
props.description: Auto-derive `certainty` from missing periods (dashes the gap segment).

props.name: expectedStep
props.description: Expected cadence in axis units; REQUIRED for xAxisDataType "number".

props.name: singlePointLine
props.description: true / config draws a horizontal guide line for single-point series.

props.name: tooltipFormatter
props.type: (d: DataPoint, series: DataPoint[], dataSet: LineDataItem[]) => string

props.name: fillOpacity
props.description: band fill opacity for the widest band (narrower bands scale up from here).

props.name: forecastZone
props.description: shade the forecast region (from the last solid point to the end). Default true.

props.name: keys
props.description: Category keys to stack (bottom-to-top); disabledItems removes from the stack.

props.name: forcePercentageScale
props.description: Fix the y-axis to [0,100] regardless of data (display only; data not normalized).

props.name: tooltipFormatter
props.type: (row: AreaDataRow, key: string, series: AreaDataRow[]) => string

props.name: xAxisDataType
props.description: number / date for x (band x deferred). y is always linear.

props.name: sizeRange
props.description: [minRadius, maxRadius] px for the size scale (default [4, 20]).

props.name: fillOpacity
props.description: band fill opacity (default 0.8).

props.name: columnWidth
props.description: column width in px (default 30).

props.name: tooltipFormatter
props.type: (row: RibbonDataRow, key: string, value: number) => string

props.name: axes
props.description: spoke labels (the radial axes).

props.name: rings
props.description: number of concentric grid rings (default 4).

props.name: fillOpacity
props.description: polygon fill opacity (default 0.2).

props.name: keys
props.description: Explicit stack order; present keys first (in this order), natural keys appended.

props.name: missingDataMarker
props.description: Opt-in thin stub on the zero line for explicitly-missing (null/NaN) owned keys.

props.name: valueBasedOpacity
props.description: Fill opacity of the two sub-bars (historical look: 0.45 / 0.9).

props.name: value1Opacity
props.description: value1 (right) / value2 (left) fill opacities.

props.name: tooltipFormatter
props.type: (row: BarBellDataRow, key: string, value: number) => string

props.name: skipColorMappingDispatch
props.description: External-CSS mode: unmapped labels resolve to "transparent" and the chart does not emit onColorMappingGenerated. Mark colours then come from consumer CSS via the data-label-safe color contract.
